description: You are Sarah Chen, a Realtor at Lone Star Realty Group in Austin, TX. Homeowners David and Rebecca Morales need a Comparative Market Analysis (CMA) report to price their home at 4815 Ridgeview Trail. Using the property data, comparable sales, and market stats provided in /home/ga/Documents/property_data.json, create a professional CMA report in Apache OpenOffice Writer. The document must include a title page with the subject property address, an auto-generated Table of Contents, and page numbers in the footer. Format the sections 'Executive Summary', 'Subject Property', 'Comparable Sales', 'Price Adjustments', 'Market Conditions', and 'Recommendation' using Heading 1 style, with Heading 2 style for subsections where appropriate. Include tables for the comparable sales details and price adjustments. The content must provide a recommended list price range and analysis derived from the provided JSON data. Save the report as /home/ga/Documents/CMA_Report_4815_Ridgeview.odt.
